The location for monitoring the operation state. It contains the
absolute URL of the status monitor resource, including an api-version
query parameter. EX "/deviceCertificates/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/{providerName}/namespaces/{namespaceResourceName}/devices/{deviceResourceName}/issueCertOperations/{operationId}?policyName={policyName}&api-version=20250701-preview".

before polling the operation status.

DeviceUpdateError.description:
Details about an error that occurred during update installation.

Follows the standard Azure / OData error shape (`Azure.Core.Foundations.Error`):
- `code` carries the error category (constrained to a known set, but extensible).
- `message` is the human-readable description of the failure.
- `innererror.code` carries the agent-reported numeric error code as a string.

message.description: A human-readable representation of the error.

details.description: An array of details about specific errors that led to this reported error.

innererror.description: An object containing more specific information than the current object about the error.

code.description: The category of the error, used to determine accountability and remediation.

DeviceUpdateErrorCreateOrUpdate.description:
Details about an error that occurred during update installation.

Follows the standard Azure / OData error shape (`Azure.Core.Foundations.Error`):
- `code` carries the error category (constrained to a known set, but extensible).
- `message` is the human-readable description of the failure.
- `innererror.code` carries the agent-reported numeric error code as a string.

message.description: A human-readable representation of the error.

details.description: An array of details about specific errors that led to this reported error.

innererror.description: An object containing more specific information than the current object about the error.

code.description: The category of the error, used to determine accountability and remediation.

DeviceUpdateId.description: A unique identifier for an update referenced by the device update agent.

DeviceUpdateIdCreateOrUpdate.description: A unique identifier for an update referenced by the device update agent.

ErrorCategory.description: The category of an update installation error.

values.name: RETRYABLE
values.description: Transient networking or service-side condition; the agent may retry the operation.

values.name: SERVICE
values.description: The update metadata is invalid or incompatible; the service must fix the update.

values.name: DEVICE_CONDITION
values.description: Device-local state prevents the update; may self-resolve or require operator action.

values.name: DEVICE_FAULT
values.description: Device resource or hardware problem requiring operator intervention.

values.name: AGENT_FAULT
values.description: Agent implementation error; should not occur in production.

values.name: SECURITY
values.description: Cryptographic or integrity validation failure requiring investigation.

The full chain of the issued certificate, including any intermediate
certification authorities (ICAs) and the root certification authority
(CA). The first certificate in the list is the issued leaf certificate.
Each subsequent certificate is the issuer of the previous.

object depends on `kind`; for report kinds it conforms to the
